SurveyQuestion.title: SurveyQuestion
SurveyQuestion.description: Represents a single survey question in the 'Gamers' Night Challenge' game.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SurveyQuestion entity.

questionTextArabic.description: The full text of the survey question in Arabic.

order.description: The sequential order in which the question appears in the game, from 1 to 8.

visualSceneDescription.description: A textual description or identifier of the 2D game environment/scene for this question stage (e.g., 'bedroom_stage1').

googleFormEntryId.description: An identifier used to map this question to a specific entry field in the target Google Form/Sheet for data submission.

SurveyOption.title: SurveyOption
SurveyOption.description: Represents a single answer option for a survey question.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SurveyOption entity.

surveyQuestionId.description: Reference to the SurveyQuestion this option belongs to. (Relationship: SurveyQuestion 1:N SurveyOption)

optionTextArabic.description: The text of the answer option in Arabic.

visualIconReference.description: A URL or identifier for the visual icon/object that players interact with to select this option in the game.

pointsAwarded.description: The number of points awarded to the player for selecting this specific option.

googleFormOptionValue.description: The specific value string that should be sent to Google Forms/Sheets if this option is selected.

PlayerProfile.title: PlayerProfile
PlayerProfile.description: Stores information about a player, identified by their anonymous user ID.

id.description: Unique, anonymized identifier for the PlayerProfile entity. This ID corresponds to the Firebase Anonymous Auth UID.

playerName.description: The player's chosen display name for the session.

firstSessionDate.description: Timestamp of the player's first recorded game session.

lastSessionDate.description: Timestamp of the player's most recent game session.

totalGamesPlayed.description: The total number of game sessions completed or started by this player.

highestSessionScore.description: The highest score achieved by this player in a single completed game session.

initialSurveyScore.description: The score obtained from the initial 8-question survey.

completedChallenges.description: A list of titles of the challenges the player has completed.

GameSession.title: GameSession
GameSession.description: Records a single complete play-through of the 'Gamers' Night Challenge' game by a player.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GameSession entity.

playerProfileId.description: Reference to the PlayerProfile associated with this session. Corresponds to the Firebase Auth UID.

playerName.description: The player's chosen display name for this session.

totalPointsEarned.description: The total points accumulated by the player during this session.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the game session was completed and recorded.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the game session score was last updated.

Badge.title: Badge
Badge.description: Defines a collectible badge that players can earn within the game.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Badge entity.

nameArabic.description: The name of the badge in Arabic (e.g., 'بومة الليل' - Night Owl).

descriptionArabic.description: A description of the badge and its significance, in Arabic.

iconReference.description: A URL or identifier for the visual icon representing the badge.

earningCriteriaDescription.description: A human-readable description of the conditions required to earn this badge (e.g., 'Complete the game scoring over 500 points.').

SurveyResponse.title: SurveyResponse
SurveyResponse.description: Stores a player's complete set of answers to the initial 8-question survey.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SurveyResponse entity.

playerProfileId.description: The UID of the player who submitted the survey. (Corresponds to PlayerProfile ID).

playerName.description: The player's name at the time of submission.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the survey was submitted.

answers.description: The list of answers provided by the player.

definition.description: Stores the definitions for all survey questions. This is a globally readable collection, accessible to all players.

params.name: surveyQuestionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific survey question.

definition.description: Stores the definitions for all answer options for survey questions. This is a globally readable collection, accessible to all players.

params.name: surveyOptionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific survey option.

definition.description: Stores the definitions for all collectible badges in the game. This is a globally readable collection.

params.name: badgeId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific badge.

definition.description: Stores all completed game sessions for the public leaderboard. Readable by everyone, writable only by the session owner.

params.name: gameSessionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific game session.

definition.description: Stores anonymized and aggregated information for a player across game sessions. The 'playerProfileId' corresponds to the Firebase Anonymous User ID (request.auth.uid). Only the owner can read or write their own profile.

params.name: playerProfileId
params.description: The unique, anonymized identifier for the player profile, corresponding to Firebase's request.auth.uid.

definition.description: Stores individual survey submissions. Writable only by the survey owner, not publicly readable.

params.name: surveyResponseId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific survey response document.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure has been updated to support a public leaderboard. The primary change is the introduction of a top-level `/gameSessions` collection. This collection is publicly readable, allowing any client to query it to build the leaderboard display. Writes to this collection are restricted: a user can only create a game session document where the `playerProfileId` matches their own authentication UID, ensuring that players can only post their own scores. This flat structure is efficient for querying and sorting all player scores. The previously nested `gameSessions` collection has been removed. Other player-specific data remains under `/playerProfiles/{playerProfileId}` for individual user data that is not part of the public leaderboard.
